description: You find a small pouch hidden under a tree root.
You meditate beside a calm spirit pond and absorb the surrounding qi.
A weak spirit beast blocks your path.
You wander through a quiet forest but find nothing useful.
You discover an abandoned campsite with a few valuables left behind.
A group of mortal bandits tries to rob you.
You sit beneath an ancient pine tree and circulate your qi.
A thick mist surrounds you, forcing you to turn back.
You find a cracked jade box near some old ruins.
A venomous snake spirit beast lunges at you from the grass.
You discover a small cave filled with weak spiritual energy.
You follow a strange sound, but it fades before you find its source.
You help an injured outer sect disciple and receive a small reward.
A rogue cultivator challenges you for your supplies.
You rest near a waterfall and refine the qi in your body.
You search an old shrine, but everything valuable has already been taken.
You find a broken storage pouch half-buried in the dirt.
A starving wolf beast attacks you near a mountain path.
You sense a faint qi vein underground and cultivate nearby.
A wandering merchant thanks you for giving directions.
